title: Verify analytics events are fired correctly throughout the user journey
description: Tests that key analytics events are triggered with the correct attributes at various points in the Trial Corner flow.

steps.description: 1. Navigate to the homepage. Verify 'trial-corner-widget-viewed' event is fired.
2. Click the widget. Verify 'trial-corner-widget-clicked' event is fired.
3. On the Trial Corner page, verify 'trial-corner-viewed' event is fired.
4. Click the 'Cancel' button. Click 'Keep Trial & Set Reminder'.
5. Verify 'remind-me-clicked' event is fired with 'page_source: cancel pop-up'.
6. Click the 'Cancel' button again. Click 'Cancel Anyway'. Click 'Cancel Anyway' on the offer pop-up.
7. Verify 'cancel-clicked' event is fired with 'page_source: discount pop-up'.

expected_result: All specified analytics events are fired at the correct user interaction points with the correct attributes as defined in the PRD.
